events.text: Session renewal now refreshes expired credentials before protected requests resume.
Added heartbeat recovery for websocket channels when laptops wake from suspend.
Invoice totals now use decimal arithmetic so generated PDFs avoid one-cent drift.
Permission cache invalidation now runs after role assignment changes.
Background worker retries now persist the next attempt timestamp before releasing the job lock.
Adjusted the dark theme palette so disabled controls remain readable against modal surfaces.
Markdown export now redacts bearer tokens while preserving surrounding handoff context.
OpenCode reconciliation reads the configured local server URL and skips network checks when it is unset.

queries.query: login timeout keeps sending people back to sign in
